observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the v0.3.5 release source was frozen and release-current
observed_failure.observed_result: 544 tests passed, 2 skipped, and one provenance test failed because its expected project version remained 0.3.4 while pyproject.toml declared 0.3.5

classification.error_signature: release version changed without updating the exact current-version assertion

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: VERSION and pyproject.toml were neither declared inputs of the installed-provenance owner nor isolated from the default runtime-source Portfolio consumers, while the provenance test duplicated 0.3.4 as a third hard-coded value
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the release model had required VERSION and pyproject.toml to form one source-only contract component consumed exactly by installed-provenance and had compared those two authorities without a duplicated literal
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: VERSION and pyproject.toml form one release-version contract component; installed-provenance is its only validation consumer, and Portfolio, installation, and router projections do not consume it
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: VERSION or pyproject.toml change -> installed-provenance invalidation -> focused provenance test -> one stable branch full-current-suite -> receipt-only tag identity gate

generalized_repair.rule: a release version edit must keep VERSION equal to pyproject.toml; the impact compiler must select installed-provenance and no Portfolio, installation, or router consumer for that isolated component
generalized_repair.observed_regression: the focused VERSION-to-pyproject provenance test and the real-contract consumer-mapping regression both pass
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: a future mismatch fails installed-provenance, while a matching version-only bump leaves unrelated Portfolio and installation projections reusable
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: do not rerun unrelated owners, do not create a third version authority, and do not add a compatibility or fallback version reader

required_revalidation: affected-only frozen owner execution for the one-time impact-graph repair
public-export privacy owner for the new tracked review

subjects: release-version component is source-only contract_schema and consumed exactly by owner:self:installed-provenance

affected_plan.note: This one-time contract-graph repair necessarily refreshes graph consumers; the new mapping regression proves a later version-only edit selects only installed-provenance.

claim_boundary: This review validates the repair model and focused regression before publication. Installation parity, the stable branch full suite, receipt-only tag identity, and GitHub Release remain separate exact-commit closure gates.
